# Cloaks
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Cloaks&prop=wikitext

The cloak is the ability of the rogue. It gives the buffs to the player (mainly invisible)

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheCapeOfTwilight.png
| link = The Cape of Twilight
| text = The Cape of Twilight
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SpectralCloak.png
| link = Spectral Cloak
| text = Spectral Cloak
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfThePlanewalker.png
| link = Cloak of the Planewalker
| text = Cloak of the Planewalker
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfBloodySurprises.png
| link = Cloak of Bloody Surprises
| text = Cloak of Bloody Surprises
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfThe1000Oceans.png
| link = Cloak of the 1000 Oceans
| text = Cloak of the 1000 Oceans
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DestructorCloak.png
| link = Destructor Cloak
| text = Destructor Cloak
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GhastlyDrape.png
| link = Ghastly Drape
| text = Ghastly Drape
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ShadowScales.png
| link = Shadow Scales
| text = Shadow Scales
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DeepspaceVeil.png
| link = Deepspace Veil
| text = Deepspace Veil
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = CloakOfEndlessTwilight.png
| link = Cloak of Endless Twilight
| text = Cloak of Endless Twilight
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = CloakOfGhostlyConcealment.png
| link = Cloak of Ghostly Concealment
| text = Cloak of Ghostly Concealment
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfShadows.png
| link = Cloak of Shadows
| text = Cloak of Shadows
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfDarkness.png
| link = Cloak of Darkness
| text = Cloak of Darkness
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CloakOfSpeed.png
| link = Cloak of Speed
| text = Cloak of Speed
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfTheNightThief.png
| link = Cloak of the Night Thief
| text = Cloak of the Night Thief
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CloakOfTheRedAgent.png
| link = Cloak of the Red Agent
| text = Cloak of the Red Agent
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
